'''âch-ch-f-zh''' ('''kachachfezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molehill|molehill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ch-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molehill|molehill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-ch-f-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachachfezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichachfezhoko|thichachfezhoko]] || [[word:jichachfezhoko|jichachfezhoko]] || [[word:shichachfezhoko|shichachfezhoko]] || [[word:kichachfezhoko|kichachfezhoko]]
|-
